program.title: Minimalift 5-Day Upper/Lower/Full Body
program.description: 12-week strength program split into 3 phases (Base, Build, Peak). Each phase is 4 weeks; each week is 5 training days plus 2 rest days.

phases.name: The Base
phases.description: Slightly higher reps, shorter rest, focus on range of motion and endurance. Lays the foundation for recovery and joint integrity.

phases.name: The Build
phases.description: Heavier weights to improve nervous system efficiency. Strategic pauses and partial reps supercharge hypertrophy and mobility.

phases.name: The Peak
phases.description: Heaviest weights of the program. Lower set volume, longer rest, unlocks accumulated strength.

exercises.name: Pogos
exercises.notes: Stay light on your feet and keep your knees soft

exercises.name: Barbell Squat
exercises.notes: First, work up to a hard 8-10 reps. Then, start a 15 minute timer and perform as many rounds as possible of 3 reps. Track total rounds completed.

exercises.name: Knee Tuck
exercises.notes: After each set of Squats, perform the core exercise. Then, rest as required before returning to squats

exercises.name: Dumbbell RDL
exercises.notes: Pause on final rep for 10 seconds in the stretch position

exercises.name: Seated Good Morning
exercises.notes: 2 second pause at the bottom of each rep.

exercises.name: Couch Stretch
exercises.notes: Perform this immediately after each set of SGMs, then rest and return to SGMs

exercises.name: Scapula Pull Up
exercises.notes: Place your feet on the ground to offload your bodyweight as needed

exercises.name: Z-Press
exercises.notes: First, work up to a hard 8-10 reps on both exercises. Then, start a 15 minute timer and perform as many rounds as possible of 3 reps on each exercise. Rest as needed. Track total rounds completed.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: For additional gains, you can increase by 1 to 2 sets per exercise.

exercises.name: Scapula Push Up
exercises.notes: Perform immediately after each set of Dumbbell Presses, then rest before returning to Dumbbell Press

exercises.name: Pullover + Skullcrusher
exercises.notes: Perform as a superset - minimal rest between exercises

exercises.name: Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: Perform as a superset - minimal rest between exercises

exercises.name: Halos (KB or DB)
exercises.notes: Perform as a superset - minimal rest between exercises

exercises.name: Turkish Get Up
exercises.notes: Dumbbell, Kettlebell or Bodyweight

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: First, work up to a hard 8-10 reps. Then, start a 15 minute timer and perform as many rounds as possible of 3 reps. Track total rounds completed.

exercises.name: Hollowbody Hold
exercises.notes: Between each set of Deadlifts, perform a set of Hollow Holds. Rest as needed, then return to Deadlifts. Pick a level of difficulty that is just manageable by the end

exercises.name: Deficit Reverse Lunge
exercises.notes: Perform all reps on one side before switching to the other leg

exercises.name: Copenhagen Plank
exercises.notes: Select your choice of difficulty

exercises.name: Backwards Treadmill Walk
exercises.notes: Perform both exercises as a timed circuit. No rest between exercises. 30s rest between rounds

exercises.name: Suitcase March
exercises.notes: Perform stationary if space is limited. Switch the starting arm on each round

exercises.name: Scapula Pull Up
exercises.notes: Place your feet on the ground to offload your bodyweight as needed

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.notes: First, work up to a hard 8-10 reps on both exercises. Then, start a 15 minute timer and perform as many rounds as possible of 3 reps on each exercise. Rest as needed. Track total rounds completed.

exercises.name: Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: 1 & ¼ reps. Go all the way down, ¼ of the way up, all the way down, all the way up - that counts as 1 rep.

exercises.name: Seated Shoulder Extension
exercises.notes: Do this immediately after each set of CGBP. Then rest and return to CGBP

exercises.name: Y Raise
exercises.notes: Perform as a superset - minimal rest between exercises

exercises.name: Squat Curl
exercises.notes: Perform as a superset - minimal rest between exercises

exercises.name: Katana Extension
exercises.notes: Perform as a superset - minimal rest between exercises

exercises.name: Bear Crawl
exercises.notes: Count your reps as steps - 10 reps forwards, 10 reps back

exercises.name: Box Squat
exercises.notes: Perform all reps explosively. Keep the weight slightly below a true max (70-80%) to ensure you can maintain max power and speed.

exercises.name: Chin Up
exercises.notes: Perform as a superset - minimal rest between exercises

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.notes: Perform as a superset - minimal rest between exercises

exercises.name: Dumbbell Thruster
exercises.notes: Pace yourself - you’re going to get seriously gassed from this superset!

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.notes: This is your rest period between rounds of Thrusters.

exercises.name: Barbell Squat
exercises.notes: Warm up as required. Set a timer for 10 minutes. EMOM, do the following: Minute 1: 1 set of 5 at 6 RIR Minute 2: 1 set of 5 at 4 RIR Minute 3-10: Sets of 3-5 at 3 RIR

exercises.notes: After each set of Squats, perform the core exercise. Then, rest as required before returning to squats

exercises.notes: 2 second pause at the top of each rep

exercises.name: Z-Press

exercises.notes: 2 second hold at the top of each rep Perform as a superset - no rest between exercises.

exercises.name: Side Lying Compound Raise
exercises.notes: Switch the starting arm on each round. Perform as a superset - no rest between exercises.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: Warm up as required. Set a timer for 10 minutes. EMOM, do the following: Minute 1: 1 set of 5 at 6 RIR Minute 2: 1 set of 5 at 4 RIR Minute 3-10: Sets of 3-5 at 2-3 RIR

exercises.name: Hollowbody Hold
exercises.notes: Between each set of Deadlifts, perform a set of Hollow Holds. Rest as needed, then return to Deadlifts. Pick a level of difficulty that is just manageable by the end

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Pause in the bottom of each rep for 3 seconds

exercises.name: Zercher March
exercises.notes: Perform both exercises as a timed circuit. No rest between exercises. 30s rest between rounds

exercises.name: Turkish Get Up
exercises.notes: Dumbbell, Kettlebell or Bodyweight

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.notes: Warm up as required. Set a timer for 20 minutes. E2MOM, do the following: Minute 1: 1 set of 5 at 6 RIR Minute 2: 1 set of 5 at 4 RIR Minute 3-10: Sets of 3-5 at 2-3 RIR

exercises.name: Seated Shoulder Extension
exercises.notes: Do this immediately after each set of OHP. Then rest and return to OHP

exercises.name: Cross Body Triceps Extension

exercises.notes: Count your reps as steps - 10 reps forwards, 10 reps back
